name: Experity Urgent Care EMR API
what_it_does: Experity REST API for urgent care EMR and practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient registration and visit workflows, handle urgent care encounter documentation, process occupational health visit data, access billing and claims management, retrieve real-time wait time and capacity data, manage patient tracking board workflows, integrate with diagnostic imaging and lab systems, handle patient communication and follow-up workflows, and connect urgent care data with employer occupational health programs.
use_cases: Managing patient registration and urgent care visit workflows from clinic operations agents
Processing occupational health visit documentation from employer health agents
Retrieving real-time patient wait times and capacity from patient flow agents
Accessing billing and claims data from revenue cycle agents
not_for: Emergency department care without urgent care walk-in workflow focus
Primary care offices without urgent care volume and throughput focus
Specialty care without urgent care occupational health integration
best_when: An urgent care clinic or occupational health center using Experity wants AI agents to automate patient flow, registration, documentation, billing, and employer reporting workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Urgent care patient PHI includes presenting complaint and treatment data. Occupational health data includes work-related injury and drug test results — OSHA compliance required. Workplace injury records have employer access limitations.

auth.notes: Experity uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Clinic-level credentials with patient and billing scopes. Formed from merger of DocuTap and Practice Velocity in 2019. Partner program for technology integrations. Limited public developer documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — urgent care enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-clinic monthly pricing; multi-site enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Machesney Park, Illinois. Formed 2019 by merger of DocuTap and Practice Velocity. Market leader for urgent care EMR. 5,700+ urgent care clinics. Also serves occupational health and telehealth urgent care. Competes with Experity (itself), Concentra, and general EHRs for urgent care.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Urgent care PHI including presenting complaint — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
No webhooks — polling required for patient tracking and visit updates
Occupational health data includes drug test results — DOT and employer access rules apply
OSHA injury records have specific retention and reporting requirements
Merged platform (DocuTap + Practice Velocity) — API documentation may reference legacy product names
agent_readiness.security_notes: Urgent care PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, OSHA. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Occupational health drug test data extra sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Urgent care PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, OSHA. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required.
